pinpoint.inapptemplate.bodyconfig.Alignm.Docs: The text alignment of the main body text of the message. Acceptable values: `LEFT`, `CENTER`, `RIGHT`.

pinpoint.inapptemplate.bodyconfig.Body.Docs: The main body text of the message.

pinpoint.inapptemplate.bodyconfig.TextCo.Docs: The color of the body text, expressed as a hex color code (such as #000000 for black).
